commands.name: file

options.name: --target-folder
options.description:
The target folder where the minified file will be written.
Defaults to the current folder.

arguments.name: filepath
arguments.description:
The fully qualified file path for the target json file to 
minify.

commands.description:
Default command that minifies the specified json 
file.

commands.name: folder

options.name: --target-folder
options.description:
The target folder where the minified files will be written.
Defaults to the current folder.

arguments.name: folderpath
arguments.description:
The fully qualified target directory/folder path to search 
for json files to minify.

commands.description:
Command that minifies all of the json files in the specified 
folder.

options.name: --target-folder
options.description:
The target folder where the minified file will be written.
Defaults to the current folder.

arguments.name: filepath
arguments.description:
The fully qualified file path for the target json file to 
minify.
